column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to June 14, with back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list, retroactive to June 16, with a left oblique strain.
• Chicago Cubs placed LHP Hoby Milner on the 15-day injured list with appendicitis, retroactive to June 26.
• The Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Baltimore Orioles designated right-handed pitcher Kyle Nicolas for assignment.
• Oakland Athletics designated third baseman Brett Harris for assignment.
• The Atlanta Braves signed veteran free agent RHP Carlos Carrasco to a minor league contract.
• New York Mets sent 1B Jorge Polanco to Triple-A Syracuse to begin a rehab assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RF Jesús Sánchez on the 10-day injured list with a right ankle sprain.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
